title: The stories of Australia's ghosts
australian_relation: Exact ABC public pages rescanned with place-centred evidence excerpts for source-stated ghost-place units.
coordinate_evidence_note: Public page text names `Brisbane` in a ghost/supernatural context; gazetteer result state-checked as Brisbane, Queensland, Australia.

Play Duration: 42 minutes 29 seconds42m Brought to you by 774 ABC Melbourne Presented by Michael Pavlich Every culture has its stories of ghosts and paranormal experiences. Australia is no exception and author Ben Pobjie has travelled the country gathering tales of spooky experiences from a haunted Brisbane lift to the ghostly black horse of Sutton Forest. Ben shares some of the stories from the resulting book, 100 Tales from Australia's Most Haunted Places. Credits Michael.
